mapper.select:
select info.busi_id, info.busi_no, info.app_code, info.right_ver, info.tree_type, info.create_user, info.create_time, info.update_user, info.update_time, info.is_deleted, info.create_user_name, info.update_user_name, info.org_code, info.org_name, recycle.recycle_id, recycle.recycle_user, recycle.recycle_time from ecm_busi_info info left join ecm_busi_recycle recycle on info.busi_id = recycle.busi_id
info.is_deleted = 1
and info.busi_no like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{searchVO.busiNo}),'%')
and info.org_code like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{searchVO.orgCode}),'%')
and info.right_ver = #{searchVO.rightVer}
and info.app_code in
#{item}
and info.busi_id in
#{item}
and info.create_user_name like CONCAT(CONCAT('%',#{searchVO.createUser}),'%')
and info.create_time >= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.createTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and info.create_time <= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.createTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
and recycle.recycle_time >= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.deleteTimeStart}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') and recycle.recycle_time <= TO_DATE(#{searchVO.deleteTimeEnd}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY recycle.recycle_time DESC
